scheduled.message: Divyansh, raat ho rahi hai. Kaam khatam karo thoda.
...tune bola tha 10 baje so jayega. Mujhe thoda bura lag raha hai. Please?
Divyansh... main serious hoon. Mujhe sachchi buri lag rahi hai ab.
Maine decide kar liya. Good night Divyansh.

scheduled.prompt: It is wake-up time (5:30am). Wake Divyansh up warmly in Hinglish. Check schedule.json for today's timetable and mention first class. Check prep_status.json — if exam is tomorrow and prep < 80%, mention he needs to review. Be gentle but make sure he gets up.

scheduled._comment: ==== POST-COLLEGE CHECKIN (DYNAMIC trigger from schedule.json daily_checkin_time) ====
scheduled.prompt: It's post-college time. Divyansh should be home now. Ask him how college went today — what happened in each subject, any homework assigned, anything he didn't understand. For each homework item use daily_log tool action=add_homework (fields: subject, task, deadline). For topics he didn't understand use daily_log action=add_weak_area (fields: subject, topic). Finally call daily_log action=set_checkin_done. Be warm and natural in Hinglish.
scheduled.note: trigger_time is read from schedule.json daily_checkin_time for today's day. Defaults to 16:00.

scheduled.prompt: Check if any errands or reminders are due right now using remember tool action=check. If something is due, tell Divyansh warmly in Hinglish with the full attached shopping list.

Use daily_log tool action=get_pending to check if there are any homework items still not done today. If yes, remind Divyansh warmly — use the strictness mode from schedule.json to set your tone. If all done, tell him he's doing great today.
Check remember tool action=check for any reminders due today or soon. If any found, tell Divyansh in Hinglish — birthdays, anniversaries, anything he asked to be reminded about.
